name: Fluff Step
outcome: In the time it takes for [TargetName] to blink, [AttackerName] has gone from standing stock still to dashing forward at blinding speed, proceeding to knock [TargetHisOrHer] legs out from under [TargetHimOrHer] the moment [AttackerHeOrShe] is behind [TargetName].|n|This leaves [TargetName] falling back onto a bed of pillows, too dazed and comfortable to stop [AttackerName] from slipping off a shoe and planting a stocking clad foot down on [TargetHisOrHer] crotch.
miss: In the time it takes for [TargetName] to blink, [AttackerName] has gone from standing stock still to dashing forward at blinding speed, but by a hair [TargetName] manages to dodge [AttackerHisOrHer] sudden assault!
